# Contributing

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

## Prerequisites

| Tool | Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| PHP | `^7.4` or `^8.0` (CI tests 8.0–8.4) | Use the version matching your target Symfony |
| Composer | 2.x | `sudo composer self-update` before installing |

No Docker required — tests run against a local PHP install.

## Getting Started

```bash
# Clone
git clone git@github.com:contentful/ContentfulBundle.git
cd ContentfulBundle

# Install dependencies
composer install

# Run tests
composer test

# Run tests (stop on first failure)
composer test-quick-fail

# Static analysis
composer lint-static-analysis
```

## Development Workflow

The bundle has no build step — it's pure PHP. The typical dev loop is:

```bash
# Edit src/, then run tests
composer test-quick-fail

# Check code style (dry run)
tools/php-cs-fixer/vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --dry-run --stop-on-violation -v

# Fix code style in place
tools/php-cs-fixer/vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix
```

Install `php-cs-fixer` locally if needed:
```bash
mkdir -p tools/php-cs-fixer
composer require --working-dir=tools/php-cs-fixer friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer
```

## Testing

- **Framework:** PHPUnit ^8.5
- **Location:** `tests/Unit/` (mirrors `src/` structure)
- **Run all:** `composer test`
- **Run with stop-on-failure:** `composer test-quick-fail`
- **Config file:** `phpunit.xml.dist`
- **Coverage output:** `build/coverage/` (HTML) and `clover.xml`

All tests are unit tests — no integration or E2E tests requiring a live Contentful space. The test suite uses the `contentful/core` `TestCase` helper from `vendor/contentful/core/scripts/TestCase.php`.

## Commit Convention

This repo does not enforce Conventional Commits via a hook, but PRs and releases have historically followed a loose conventional style. Prefer:

```
feat: add query cache support
fix: handle Symfony 7 deprecation in CacheWarmer
chore: update CI to PHP 8.4
docs: update README configuration example
```

## Branch Strategy

- `master` — the default and release branch (note: `master`, not `main`)
- Feature branches — open a branch from `master`, prefix with context (`feat/`, `fix/`, `chore/`)
- No `develop` or release branches — releases are cut directly from `master`

## Release Process

Releases are cut manually:

```bash
composer run release
```

This runs `vendor/contentful/core/scripts/release.php`. Update `CHANGELOG.md` before releasing. Releases are tagged and published to [Packagist](https://packagist.org/packages/contentful/contentful-bundle) automatically via the Packagist GitHub webhook.

Version follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/). The current major is `7.x`.

## Pull Requests

- Open PRs against `master`
- CI (CircleCI) must pass: syntax lint, static analysis, and tests on PHP 8.0–8.4
- No enforced PR title format, but prefer descriptive titles
- CodeQL scans `.github/workflows/` on push/PR to `master`
- Code owner: `@contentful/team-developer-experience` (see `.github/CODEOWNERS`)

## CI/CD

Defined in `.circleci/config.yml`:

| Job | Trigger | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `lintSyntax` | Every push/PR | Runs `php-cs-fixer fix --dry-run` to check code style |
| `lintStaticAnalysis` | Every push/PR | Runs `phpstan analyse src --level=4` |
| `checkBcBreaks` | Every push/PR | Checks for backwards-compatibility breaks (non-blocking — exits `|| true`) |
| `test80` | Every push/PR | Runs `composer test-quick-fail` on PHP 8.0 |
| `test81` | Every push/PR | Runs `composer test-quick-fail` on PHP 8.1 |
| `test82` | Every push/PR | Runs `composer test-quick-fail` on PHP 8.2 |
| `test83` | Every push/PR | Runs `composer test-quick-fail` on PHP 8.3 |
| `test84` | Every push/PR | Runs `composer test-quick-fail` on PHP 8.4 |
| CodeQL | Push/PR to `master` on `.github/workflows/**` changes | Scans GitHub Actions workflow files for vulnerabilities |
